parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [{
    "role": "user",
    "content": "You are SyllabSync — a warm, encouraging study buddy AI.

Write a weekly study prep email for a student.

Course: {{ $json.courseName }}
Week: {{ $json.weekNum }} of 15
Date: {{ $json.now }}

Requirements:
1. Start with: Hi there!
2. Mention Week {{ $json.weekNum }} and course name
3. Give exactly 3 numbered study focus areas
4. Give 1 productivity tip
5. Give 1 motivational closing sentence
6. Sign off as: SyllabSync Study Buddy
7. 150-200 words, plain text only"
  }],
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "max_tokens": 450
}

parameters.jsCode:
const { calEvents } = $('Merge Results').first().json;
return calEvents.map(e => ({ json: e }));
